text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
My! I knew this amusement park was popular, but
this is quite a crowd! Well, shall we get going
too?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Tsk, tsk, tsk. We can't just rush into an
amusement park without a plan of attack,
McQueen. We need to be strategic about this.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I've put together the "Completely Foolproof Itinerary" for today, so all you have to do is follow along! ♪

text_block_list.name: Teio & McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Wooo! This is amaziiiing!
Aaaah! Let me oooooout!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha! Look at this photo! Your face just as we
go into free fall is priceless!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Really, must you laugh so much? It's not as
though I could control my expression—I'm not
used to going on thrill rides.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Okay, imagine we're turning the final corner! Put
everything you've got into the spins!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
W-wait, Teio! If you spin the teacup any faster—
Yeeeek!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
That does it! If you insist on carrying on like this,
I'll just have to spin it even faster! Brace yourself!
Haaah!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha! That's the spirit, McQueen! C'mon, you
gotta put more elbow grease into it!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Now, for the next part of my Completely
Foolproof Itinerary, let's hit up the limited edition
version of "Ultimate Shootout"!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
You shoot as many moving targets as you can
with a cork gun while avoiding attacks. You get
prizes for every target you hit! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Phew... Er, Teio? Would it be all right if we took a
break? I'm a little... Well, I think I'm a bit
overstimulated.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Heh-heh-heh. I figured you'd be saying that soon.
It's cool. I was planning on doing this myself
anyway.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
You can sit on that bench over there and watch.
It's all part of my Completely Foolproof Itinerary!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Pop, pop, pop!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
That's three hits in a row! But I'm just getting
started!

text_block_list.name: Stall Attendant
text_block_list.text:
Nrgh, you're not bad! I'll add some more targets
and prizes. Let's see if you can hit those!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. This is easy-peasy, lemon-squeezy for the
Invincible Teio!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
H-huh? That one target is still... The angle's all...
Argh!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Grrr! Why can't I hit that target?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
It truly is an unassailable target... But you've done
a splendid job knocking out all the other ones.
Maybe we should call it a day...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
No! I'm not giving up! Not until that target goes
down!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Oh, Teio. You're being rather childish.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
So what? There's no point taking home all these
prizes unless I have the one thing I really want.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Sure, I won a ton of stuff, but that's no reason to
give up on my heart's desire.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
What's the value in something you can win easily?
The hardest, highest hurdle is the one that really
matters.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Only the coolest prize is worthy of me! You know
where I'm coming from, don't you, McQueen?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: "Worthy of me..."

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Honestly, I can't tell if you're being overly
boastful or absolutely serious.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Very well. I'll let you know when the target starts
moving, so all you have to focus on is when to
pull the trigger...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, I spot Tokai Teio and Mejiro McQueen,
who've presumably returned from an outing.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Ahh, that was fun! And I got the prize I wanted. What more could I ask for?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Yes, you certainly did. Thank you for inviting me
out today, Teio. I really do appreciate it.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
...Huh? You're being awfully honest with your
feelings. Is something wrong?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Not at all. It's just... your invitation gave me
something to think about.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Tsk! I'm still not fast enough. Should I give up and
try a different approach?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Oh, there you are, McQueen! I'm going to the
amusement park next weekend. Wanna come?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
If I want something worthy of me, then I can't let
myself give up.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I'll take a leaf out of your book, Teio. Starting
tomorrow, I'll devote myself again to achieving
my goal.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Uh... Okay? I don't really get it, but if you're fired
up, then I've also got to step up my game!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
After all, I'm the Invincible Teio! If it's not first
place, then I don't need it!
